source.frequencyBasis: Learner-focused ordering of 100 common Spanish verbs, seeded from Spanish lemma frequency resources.
source.conjugationBasis: Present, preterite, imperfect, and present perfect indicative forms generated from regular endings plus explicit overrides for common irregular and stem-changing verbs.

items.source: Seeded from a learner-focused common Spanish verb frequency order. Indicative forms use regular Spanish conjugation rules plus explicit common-irregular and stem-changing overrides.

imperfect.english: I used to be a student.
You used to be a student.
He/she used to be a student.
You all used to be students.
